message:
feat(runtime,widgets): add VOI telemetry and debug overlay widget

Implement Value-of-Information (VOI) telemetry infrastructure and a
debug overlay widget for visualizing VOI-based sampling decisions
during inline auto height measurement.

VOI Telemetry (voi_telemetry.rs):
- Global snapshot storage for inline auto VOI state
- Thread-safe access via OnceLock
- Functions: set_inline_auto_voi_snapshot(), inline_auto_voi_snapshot(),
  clear_inline_auto_voi_snapshot()
- Enables cross-module visibility of VOI decisions

VOI Sampling Updates (voi_sampling.rs):
- VoiSamplerSnapshot: Serializable snapshot of sampler state
- snapshot() method on VoiSampler for telemetry export
- Public re-export of VoiSamplerSnapshot

VOI Debug Overlay Widget (voi_debug_overlay.rs):
- VoiDebugOverlay: Semi-transparent overlay showing VOI metrics
- Displays: current VOI, threshold, sample count, history
- Sparkline visualization of recent VOI values
- Configurable position (top-right corner by default)
- Color coding: green (exploring), yellow (near threshold), red (stopped)

Widget Library Updates (lib.rs):
- New voi_debug_overlay module
- Public VoiDebugOverlay export

Use Cases:
- Debugging inline auto height measurement decisions
- Visualizing exploration/exploitation tradeoff
- Monitoring VOI convergence during resize events

Part of VOI sampling integration work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
